name: Barton Associates
description: Specializes in locum tenens jobs placing physicians, nurse practitioners, physician assistants, and dentists across Texas and beyond.

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: usual high standard of professionalism that I have come to expect
very pleased with my agent. He is very helpful and great service
My consultant is great...She listens to me and is a joy to work with
Smooth comfortable service. Always prompt response

sentiment.summary: Barton Associates receives consistently strong praise for professional service, responsive staff, helpful consultants, and smooth recruitment experiences across all reviewed interactions.

name: HSC Work
address: 12401 S Post Oak Road, #D-1, Houston, Texas 77045
description: Medical staffing and executive search firm offering locum tenens services.

name: Physician Resources, Inc.
description: Provides locum tenens, temp-to-hire, and direct hire services for physicians throughout Texas since 1988, including family practice, OB/GYN, and pediatrics.

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: I would highly recommend PRI to others
They do an excellent job and are always supportive
help us meet our staffing needs so that we may provide outstanding service

sentiment.summary: Clinic Director strongly endorses Physician Resources, Inc. for reliable, excellent staffing support that enables outstanding patient care.

name: Provenir Healthcare
description: Premier Texas locum staffing firm connecting medical practices with qualified locum employees including various medical professionals.
